properties.name: demo_site
properties.description: Illustrative ~896 ha AOI within Prey Lang Wildlife Sanctuary, Cambodia. This is NOT a surveyed project boundary and does not claim to match the footprint of any specific reported clearing event - it is a representative box within a well-documented deforestation hotspot, chosen for an educational/portfolio project. See docs/limitations.md.
properties.reference_point: 13.174389 N, 105.619171 E (Wikipedia: Prey Lang Wildlife Sanctuary)
